to talk to, converse with (acc.),  MBh.

results.rendered_html:
prabhāṣ 1 A.
1 To speak to, address to; sthitadhīḥ kiṃ prabhāṣeta  Bg. 2. 54. 
2 To proclaim; publish.
3 To disclose, reveal.
4 To expound, explain.
5 To prate, prattle.
